details.title: Event Details
details.ensureDupr: Ensure your DUPR rating is within the required range of
details.bracket_note: Note: If player counts are uneven when the bracket is generated, the highest-seeded players will automatically receive a 'Bye' (a free pass to Round 2) based on the automated mathematical system.
details.pending_desc: Verify off-platform payments or manually review users before allowing them into the official bracket.
details.manage_seeds_desc: Drag and drop the cards below to override DUPR and adjust seeds manually.

bracket.notGenerated: Bracket will be generated once registration closes.
bracket.hidden: Bracket is locked and will be revealed when the event goes Live.
bracket.approveNextRoundDesc: All scores have been recorded. Once you approve this round, the scores will lock and the next matchups will be revealed to the players.

admin.engineDesc: Manage the algorithmic generation of the tournament bracket.
admin.bracketLiveDesc: The tournament is currently in progress. Bracket generation is locked to protect live match data.

create.title: Host New Event
create.subtitle: Create a tournament or open play session and start building your roster.
create.feePlaceholder: e.g., $20 or 500k VND (Leave blank for Free)
create.paymentDisclaimer: Payments are handled off-platform directly between players and the host.
create.error_even_players: Max players must be an even number!

alerts.no_tie: Matches cannot end in a tie.
alerts.min_11: Invalid Score: The winner must reach at least 11 points.
alerts.win_by_2: Invalid Score: Must win by 2 points.
alerts.strict_11: Invalid Score: If a game goes past 11, it ends when a player leads by exactly 2 points.
alerts.warningReset: WARNING: Are you sure you want to completely wipe the bracket? All match scores will be permanently lost.
alerts.bracketGeneratedWithdraw: The bracket has already been generated. You cannot withdraw now.
alerts.confirmWithdraw: Are you sure you want to withdraw from this event?
alerts.generateBeforeLive: You must generate the bracket before starting the event.
alerts.resetBeforeReg: Cannot reopen registration because the bracket is already generated. Reset the bracket first if you need to add more players.
alerts.notEnoughPlayers: Not enough approved players to generate a bracket.
alerts.enterBothScores: Please enter scores for both players.
alerts.scoreUpdatedNoDupr: Score updated in bracket! Note: Global DUPR ratings were already processed during the first save and are not automatically reversed.
alerts.confirmRollback: Are you sure you want to rollback to
alerts.confirmCrownChampion: Are you sure you want to finalize the tournament results and crown the champion?
alerts.confirmLockRound: Lock Round scores and generate next matchups?
alerts.cannotModifyRoster: Cannot modify roster while bracket is active

alerts.matchSubmitted: Match submitted! Your rating has been updated.
alerts.lobbyCancelled: The host has cancelled the lobby.
alerts.invalidPickleballScore:
Invalid Score!

Pickleball games are played to 11, 15, or 21 points, and you must win by 2.

If the game goes into overtime, you must win by EXACTLY 2 points (e.g., 12-10, 16-14).

auth.signInDesc: Enter your details to sign in to Chình.
auth.signUpDesc: Join Chình and start tracking your matches.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
